---
title: "lattice_cnn"
---

Testing the implementation of the Lattice Convolutional Neural Network (L-CNN)

https://arxiv.org/pdf/2012.12901

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/lattice_cnn.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/lattice_cnn.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `get_W_conv_local` {#get_w_conv_local}

```python
def get_W_conv_local(U_conf)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/lattice_cnn.py#L82){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `get_W_bilin_local` {#get_w_bilin_local}

```python
def get_W_bilin_local(U_conf)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/lattice_cnn.py#L93){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `get_W_act_local` {#get_w_act_local}

```python
def get_W_act_local(U_conf)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/lattice_cnn.py#L105){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `get_E_local` {#get_e_local}

```python
def get_E_local(U_conf)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/lattice_cnn.py#L119){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
